# copulaNetworks

Stratified and two-phase copula network modeling for high-dimensional
dependence.

## Features

- **Stratified workflow** (`RunCopulaPipeline`): nonparanormal graphical
  lasso networks per stratum
- **Two-phase factor-vine** (`RunFactorVinePipeline`): large-sample
  factor copula prior + small-sample graphical/vine update

## Documentation

Full tutorial: [Two-Phase Factor-Vine
Vignette](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/articles/two-phase-factor-vine.html)

## Quick start

``` r

library(copulaNetworks)
# See vignette and inst/examples/example_factor_vine.R
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`ApplyMarginalSpec()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/ApplyMarginalSpec.md)
  : Map update values through a prior marginal specification
- [`BuildStrata()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/BuildStrata.md)
  : Build named strata from a declarative recipe
- [`CheckFactorStructure()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/CheckFactorStructure.md)
  : Check whether a correlation matrix is consistent with a low-rank
  factor structure
- [`ComparePairwiseMatrices()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/ComparePairwiseMatrices.md)
  : Compare pairwise matrix values across two strata
- [`ComparePriorToUpdate()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/ComparePriorToUpdate.md)
  : Compare prior factor model to Phase 2 update fit
- [`CompareTwoStrata()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/CompareTwoStrata.md)
  : Compare two fitted strata across matrix types
- [`ExtractEdges()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/ExtractEdges.md)
  : Extract edge list from a copula fit result
- [`FactorGroupsFromLoadings()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FactorGroupsFromLoadings.md)
  : Group variables by factor loading structure
- [`FitBayesianFactorUpdate()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitBayesianFactorUpdate.md)
  : Bayesian Gaussian copula update with priors centered at Phase 1
- [`FitCopulaStrata()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitCopulaStrata.md)
  : Fit copula models across prepared strata
- [`FitCopulaUpdate()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitCopulaUpdate.md)
  : Fit Phase 2 copula update on a small sample
- [`FitFactorCopulaPrior()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitFactorCopulaPrior.md)
  : Fit a factor copula prior on a large reference sample (Phase 1)
- [`FitMarginalSpec()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitMarginalSpec.md)
  : Fit marginal specification from a prior (large) sample
- [`FitStratumCopula()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitStratumCopula.md)
  : Fit a nonparanormal graphical model on one stratum
- [`FitVineCopulaUpdate()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/FitVineCopulaUpdate.md)
  : Fit a vine copula update on uniform pseudo-observations (Phase 2a)
- [`ImpliedFactorCorrelation()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/ImpliedFactorCorrelation.md)
  : Build an approximate correlation matrix from factor loadings
- [`LoadCheckpoint()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/LoadCheckpoint.md)
  : Load a checkpoint RDS file
- [`NonparanormalTransform()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/NonparanormalTransform.md)
  : Nonparanormal transformation (rank-based Gaussian copula marginals)
- [`PlotAllStrata()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PlotAllStrata.md)
  : Plot diagnostics for all fitted strata
- [`PlotCopulaCorHeatmap()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PlotCopulaCorHeatmap.md)
  : Plot copula correlation heatmap
- [`PlotCopulaNetwork()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PlotCopulaNetwork.md)
  : Plot a copula network using ggraph
- [`PlotPcorHeatmap()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PlotPcorHeatmap.md)
  : Plot partial correlation heatmap
- [`PlotStratumComparison()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PlotStratumComparison.md)
  : Plot stratum comparison diagnostics
- [`PlotStratumDiagnostics()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PlotStratumDiagnostics.md)
  : Plot single-stratum diagnostics (network + heatmaps)
- [`PrepareCopulaData()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/PrepareCopulaData.md)
  : Prepare data and strata for copula modeling (Step 0)
- [`RunCopulaPipeline()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/RunCopulaPipeline.md)
  : Run the full stratified copula pipeline
- [`RunFactorVinePipeline()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/RunFactorVinePipeline.md)
  : Run the full two-phase factor-vine copula pipeline
- [`SaveCheckpoint()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/SaveCheckpoint.md)
  : Save a checkpoint RDS file
- [`SimulateFactorCopula()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/SimulateFactorCopula.md)
  : Simulate data from a fitted factor copula prior
- [`TestPriorConsistency()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/TestPriorConsistency.md)
  : Test whether update data are consistent with the Phase 1 factor
  prior
- [`UniformMarginalTransform()`](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/reference/UniformMarginalTransform.md)
  : Transform each column to uniform margins via ranks

# Articles

### Two-Phase Factor-Vine

- [Two-Phase Factor-Vine Copula
  Networks](https://GWMcElfresh.github.io/copulaNetworks/articles/two-phase-factor-vine.md):
